violations.text: The faucets to the 3 bay sink and the mop sink were observed to be leaking/dripping between uses. Equipment is to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2025

The following areas of the physical facilities were observed in need of repair/adjustment... - The coving at the base of the wall was observed to be peeling/separating in areas of the back kitchen - Tiles below the small reach-in door to the walk-in cooler were observed to be peeling/separating - The floor drain cover in the backroom area was observed to be missing - Backroom floor tile were observed to be cracking/chipped and in need of repair/replacement - Tile grout lines were observed to be worn and in need of repair Physical facilities are to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ceiling of the walk-in cooler above the fan unit were observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, and other debris. Non-FOOD-CONTACT SURFACES of EQUIPMENT shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to preclude accumulation of soil residues. New Violation. Correct By: 05/24/2024

The floor and wall junctures in the back kitchen area were observed to have coving that is missing/in poor repair. The floor and wall junctures are to be maintained in good repair and must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024

Protective shielding is not provided for the lights in the storage area. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2024
